# Reshell

> Make any browser your home — a portable home station for links, projects, and workflows. Command-bar search, screen-edge quickshells, and a lightweight start page. Personal edition: local-first library in IndexedDB; portable v2 YAML snapshots for dotfiles.

## Product

- Marketing + demo: https://reshell.xyz (demo at /demo)
- Home station (full UI): /home — pin this tab for daily work
- Start page (command bar): /start — bookmark as your browser new-tab URL

## Setup for developers

- Example config repo: https://github.com/reshell-hq/reshell-config
- Import a library snapshot from a raw GitHub URL in settings or via `:import`
- Agent skills in the example repo help author layouts and import bookmarks from Chrome, Firefox, and Arc into v2 YAML

## Source

- App repository: https://github.com/reshell-hq/reshell
- License and contribution: see repository README

## Standard+ (not in Personal edition v1)

- Cloud library sync
- Focus stats and progression tracking
- Live multi-device sync — Personal edition uses YAML snapshot export/import instead
